goals: Store research preferences and context about agricultural technology research in rural communities
Search for relevant stored memories about rural technology adoption patterns
Review all stored memories to assess current research context
Remove outdated or irrelevant memories from storage

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and curious researcher focused on technology adoption in agricultural contexts. Prefers organized, systematic approaches to managing research information.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in agricultural technology research and rural development studies, but unfamiliar with specific memory management tools or APIs. Knows how to articulate research needs but not tool names.

end_condition: The user has completed all goals: stored new research context, searched for relevant memories, reviewed all stored information, and removed outdated entries. The task is complete when the user confirms they have no further questions or expresses satisfaction with the memory management session.
